apply_strategy: 1. Filter all job postings to those published within the last 24 hours.
2. Exclude roles that do not mention OPT/CPT/H-1B sponsorship or have unknown sponsorship status.
3. Prioritize positions requiring 0‑3 years of experience and that are explicitly entry‑level or junior.
4. Rank remaining jobs by relevance to AI, Generative AI, Machine Learning, or Data Science (keywords in title/description).
5. From the top‑ranked jobs, select 30‑50 positions that meet all criteria for today’s apply list.
6. Customize each application email using the provided email pitch template and insert role‑specific details.
7. Track applications in a spreadsheet with columns: Company, Role, URL, Date Applied, Follow‑up Date.
email_pitch:
Subject: Application for [Job Title] – International Master's Student (OPT/CPT Eligible)

Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the [Job Title] position at [Company]. I am currently completing my Master’s in Computer Science in the United States and am eligible for OPT/CPT sponsorship. My academic projects and internships have equipped me with hands‑on experience in AI/ML, data analysis, and software development using Python, TensorFlow, and cloud platforms such as AWS.

I am eager to contribute my strong analytical skills and passion for innovative technology to your team. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your needs.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Phone] | [Email] | LinkedIn: [URL]
